data.deadline_note: Article 15 cybersecurity requirements. Current law: 2 Aug 2026.
data.description: Possible API key or token in assignment in AI system code. Article 15 requires cybersecurity measures for high-risk systems. Fix: Move credentials to environment variables or a secrets manager.

data.deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.
data.description: PII or sensitive data flows into or out of LLM without redaction — information disclosure risk
data.remediation: Scrub PII before sending to model APIs and filter model output before returning to users. Use libraries like presidio, scrubadub, or pii-catcher. OWASP LLM02:2025.

data.deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.
data.description: High temperature setting (>=1.0) — review whether hallucination risk is acceptable for this use case
data.remediation: Use temperature=0 or 0.1 for factual/production tasks. Reserve high temperature for creative tasks.

data.deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.
data.description: AI API call detected — verify error handling is in place
data.remediation: Ensure AI API calls are wrapped in try/except. Handle rate limits, timeouts, and malformed responses. Required by CRA Annex I secure-by-design.

data.deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.
data.description: System prompt exposed in client code, API response, or logs — prompt leakage risk
data.remediation: Keep system prompts server-side only. Never return them in API responses or log them. Use prompt references/IDs instead of inline prompt text. OWASP LLM07:2025.

data.category: Agent Autonomy (OWASP Agentic ASI02 Tool Misuse / ASI04 Missing Guardrails)
data.deadline_note: Article 14 human oversight. Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027.
data.description: AI output may flow to HTTP mutation request — no human gate detected

data.deadline_note: Current law: 2 Aug 2026. Omnibus proposes: 2 Dec 2027 (Annex III). Trilogue in progress.
data.description: Unsafe model deserialization — arbitrary code execution risk
data.remediation: Use safetensors format or torch.load(path, weights_only=True). Never unpickle untrusted model files.
